class Rethrow {
    void wrap() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException("wrap", e);
        }
    }

    // A bare rethrow propagates, so JV001 is clean, but the catch catches only to
    // rethrow the same exception unchanged - a no-op wrapper JV004 flags.
    void bare() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV004"
            throw e;
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
